_comment: Çamoğlu Apartmanı — DetailStage metni (bu dil). Paylaşımlı ui.projects.detail varsayılanının üzerine deep-merge edilen proje-bazlı override; yalnız binaya özgü alanlar. TR kaynaktan çevrildi. Gri (örnek) değerler MEY doğrulayana kadar temsilîdir.

story.para: Çamoğlu Apartmanı offers a clean, precise reading of modern residential architecture through its two-tone white-and-anthracite façade. Its apartments draw generous daylight from large windows, while a restrained material palette and sharp lines give the street a contemporary, calm presence.
story.salonAlt: Living room — a spacious living area filled with daylight from large windows (representative image)
story.malzemeAlt: Façade detail — white concrete, anthracite panel and metal joinery (representative composition)

chapters.name: FAÇADE
chapters.text: A clean-lined modern façade built on the rhythm of white concrete and anthracite panel.

chapters.name: INTERIOR
chapters.text: Interiors that open to daylight through warm wood floors and restrained surfaces.
chapters.alt: Interior — a room with wood flooring (representative image)

chapters.name: LIVING
chapters.text: Bright, spacious living areas that look out to the city and greenery through large windows.
chapters.alt: Living room — a living area with large windows (representative image)

spaces.mapAlt: Site plan — building and garden layout (representative)

timeline.name: Structural Shell
timeline.desc: The load-bearing system and structural shell were completed.

timeline.name: Handover
timeline.desc: Finishing works and inspections were completed and the building was handed over.

samples.address: YENİ MAH. BAHARLI SOK. NO:9, PENDİK/İSTANBUL
